scripts.dev: pnpm --filter hum-core build && pnpm --filter hum-integrations build && concurrently -n core,intg,dash,portal -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "pnpm --filter hum-core build:watch" "pnpm --filter hum-integrations build:watch" "pnpm --filter hum-dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter hum-client-portal dev"
